final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of a spring cherry-blossom campus scene (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a 清新日系 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a girl wearing 水手服
Scene/backdrop: must include a school building, pink cherry blossoms falling, gentle breeze moving hair
Lighting/mood: must be sunny with a youthful atmosphere
Color palette: needs a pink cherry-blossom direction — exact saturation and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
